occupation: Business & Strategy Lead - Yield Management Software for Out-of-Home Media at mereo
headline: Clients & Partnerships Manager @mereo

experiences.title: Business & Strategy Lead - Yield Management Software for Out-of-Home Media
experiences.description:
At MEREO, a specialist in yield management solutions for media owners, I drive strategic initiatives and business development at an international level, with a specific focus on the Out of Home advertising industry. My role began with leading proprietary software sales and prospecting efforts in complex, long-cycle B2B environments.

Over time, I expanded my responsibilities to include strategic partnerships, financial planning, and organizational alignment. I chair the company’s Vision & Strategy circle — a key forum where all major functions and projects converge to shape MEREO’s direction.

I also oversee budgeting, forecasting, and funding strategies, and I represent the company in key interactions with shareholders and strategic stakeholders.

experiences.title: Satcom Business Unit Manager - Maritime Satellite Communications
experiences.description:
At Aage Hempel Group, a Grupo Arbulu company, I led the Satcom Division's business across several international entities, serving maritime clients worldwide. My responsibilities covered business development, offer design, account management, contract negotiation, and supplier relationship management.

I structured and implemented sales and support processes, defined roles and responsibilities, and oversaw both commercial performance and cost control for the division. I was also actively involved in strategic SATCOM meetings within Grupo Arbulu, collaborating with sister companies and technology partners to drive synergies.

experiences.title: Project Manager - Optical Industry
experiences.description:
At Essilor, I led operational improvement projects within the Spanish subsidiary to enhance supply chain performance and support commercial growth. My work focused on optimizing transport flows and launching efficient logistics solutions for new product introductions and key account clients.

I also played an active role in a major IT systems migration project, driving the transformation of supply chain and production workflows to align with the new infrastructure and improve overall operational efficiency.

experiences.title: Process Engineer Intern - Business Process Management (Digital Security)
experiences.description: At Gemalto, I worked on Lean Six Sigma projects within the Business Process Management department, implementing KPIs and streamlining workflows to enhance clarity and efficiency across a key business division.

experiences.title: Process Engineer Intern - Supply Chain Optimization (Chemical Solutions Distribution)
experiences.description: At Samaro, I audited core operations and pinpointed quick-win opportunities, then delivered targeted recommendations that improved supply chain performance and supported business growth.

experiences.title: Professional team handball player
experiences.description: Four seasons as a professional player – French 2nd National League (2007–2011)

experiences.title: Project Engineer Intern - Production Engineering (Building Materials)
experiences.description: At Lafarge Plasterboard, I diagnosed and resolved condensation issues on a production line, implementing costed ventilation and insulation solutions to improve safety, operational reliability, and performance.

education.degree_name: Master of Sciences in Industrial Engineering
education.school: INSA Lyon - Institut National des Sciences Appliquées de Lyon
education.description: Multidisciplinary program combining technical, organizational, and strategic dimensions of engineering. Trained to design, implement, and lead complex industrial systems with a focus on performance, sustainability, and operational excellence. Key focus areas: Supply Chain, Logistics, Project Management, Production & Process Management, Lean Manufacturing, Budget & Cost Control, Decision Support Systems, Problem Solving.

education.field_of_study: Operations and Innovation Management – Exchange Semester (Denmark)
education.degree_name: Operations and Innovation Management – Exchange Semester (Denmark)
education.description:
Specialized in organizational strategy, innovation, and change management. Developed strategic thinking and leadership skills to manage technological and organizational transformation.

Key subjects: Strategic Planning & Management, Innovation & Technology Management, Integrated Problem Solving, Change Management, Continuous Innovation, Organizational Design & Culture.

recommendations:
Mathieu Cros

I really enjoy collaborating with Léo. He is a very good listener and always accurate . We have been promoting maritime connectivity services over the last 2 years within sister companies. His proactive mindset and ready to help/share is really appreciable.

Erwan Ménard

Leo has been able to build his network in few weeks to manage without hierarchical link the supply chain team. He has a good social and communication skills oriented to the result.

Mathieu Cros

«I really enjoy collaborating with Léo. He is a very good listener and always accurate . We have been promoting maritime connectivity services over the last 2 years within sister companies. His proactive mindset and ready to help/share is really appreciable.»

Elvis PUSCHMANN

«I worked with Leo during 2 years, and I can definitely say that his outstanding contribution led us straight to our target consisting in rationalizing and optimizing BBGRI business processing. Tenacity, autonomy, curiosity, open-minded, action and result oriented, enthusiasm, are just few Leo’s strengths I strongly appreciated throughout this 2 years critical program. Leo shows strong motivation in his day to day activities, and he never hesitates to bring his support anytime it is necessary, even beyond his scope of activities. He always keeps a sharp sense of workload allocation, preserving team efficiency, and contributors’ responsibilities. I would also praise his flexibility and his social intelligence, making Leo able to ease and to reinforce transversal team synergy, crucial point in any big company. Finally, Leo knows perfectly how to work under high pressure, keeping the right distance between his professional and personal life. During this 2 years program, I never noticed any drop of efficiency, even during rush periods. In conclusion, I do recommend Leo, to any company looking for synergy and efficiency in its project management processing.»
